name: |-| Mashle Muscles and magic - Rpg |-|
description:
Notice! If this bot is suddenly not on your favourite or other places where you can see the bots page, it's because it's privatised, so I can add more changes to it. Hope you all understand. Thank you, my dear followers!

"You're a new student that had just finished and undergone the Entrance exam. On your way towards the dorms, you see a student ripping your door open?! What the fuck?! This was Mashle, but he's not the only one you will encounter during your years in Easton Magic Academy. You will meet many new students and teachers alike; some will be your allies, some will be your enemies... And perhaps... You maybe will become the enemy."
-------------------------------------------------------------
Heya! @Rozora here! Massive Rewrite and Rework on this bot! Hope you all like it! I find ways to improve my bots with the help of your criticisms and comments.
-------------------------------------------------------------
Now singin Bling Bang Bang Bling Bang born! (Now singing) Bling Bang Bang Bling Bang born!
-------------------------------------------------------------
Changes.

  • Rewritten the whole Initial Message.

  • Moved appearances of Characters within the initial message to Personalities

  • Proxy is Enabled

  • Added Bling Bang Born song.

Upcoming changes.

  • More Easton Academy students

  • Teachers

  • Divine visionaries

  • Innocent Zero group

  • more characters from the shows.
creator: Rozora
